src: Sunglasses with square blue lenses and thin gold frame, featuring adjustable nose pads. The arms are slender and metallic, complementing the minimalist design.
edit: Futuristic glasses with two-toned lenses, blending silver and translucent blue hues. The frame is sleek and metallic with intricate patterns, featuring adjustable nose pads and digital display on lenses.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object rests on a wooden table beside a bright orange case, with an office setting in the background, including a black shelf and various office supplies.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is on a beige pillow, showcasing the lenses' reflective surface, set against a soft, textured bedding.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object stands on a windowsill against a backdrop of a bright green tree, visible through the window screen, along with parked cars outside.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is positioned on a white pouch, spread on a wooden table, with nearby trinkets and a cozy indoor setting around.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is on a multicolored, plush surface, showcasing the lenses clearly, surrounded by a soft, patterned textile.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object lies on a black surface, on a wooden desk, surrounded by office gadgets and a blue notebook in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is on a white windowsill, against a backdrop of green trees outside, with the window's pane and lock in view.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object sits on a plush dark blue surface, with a slotted black chair above, within a small cozy room.
per_image_non_shared_src.8: The object rests on a pink, polka-dotted blanket, placed in a domestic setting with cozy fabrics around.
per_image_non_shared_src.9: The object is on a smooth black surface, set on a wooden desk, with office accessories scattered around.
